description: Refactor Convex runtime configuration to remove duplicated URL logic, restore local internal-function auth parity, harden auth bootstrap errors, and refresh product-facing documentation.
deviation_notes: The unattended run completed all implementation and automated verification tasks, but the workflow's manual verification pauses were replaced with documented automated-only verification. Repo-wide lint cleanup also expanded slightly to resolve pre-existing source-level failures blocking the required final lint gate.
